_publications._publicationTitle: Genetically mediated Nf1 loss in mice promotes diverse radiation-induced tumors modeling second malignant neoplasms.

_contextSnippet: found significantly increased mean terminal splenic weight in unirradiated Nf1+/− mice as compared to WT mice (Supplementary Figure 2A)
details: Significantly increased mean terminal splenic weight compared to wildtype mice in unirradiated controls
